---
title: "Appending A Document To The Previous Document"
---

You can append a document to the previous document. When you append the current document to the previous document, all the pages of the current document are added immediately after the last page of the previous document.

To append a document to the previous document:

1.  Click anywhere in the document area of the current document that you want to merge. The document is highlighted.
2.  In the upper-right corner of the document area, click the vertical ellipsis icon.   ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
A drop-down menu is displayed.

3.  Click Append document to previous or press Alt + A. The document is appended to the previous document.
